user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Daily automation: Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected. Account: Iron Creek Mining.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-07 10:54 EST
Subject: Re: partner engagement Discussion - Next Steps

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with partner engagement. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
Date: 2024-01-02 13:27 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Iron Creek Mining partner engagement

Just checking in on the partner engagement proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Meeting: partner engagement Discussion - Iron Creek Mining
Date: 2024-03-26
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Karen Berg (Iron Creek Mining), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft), David (Iron Creek Mining)

[00:02:00] Karen Berg (Iron Creek Mining): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on partner engagement from our last session.

[00:05:00] David (Iron Creek Mining): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about timeline constraints. Can we address those?

[00:10:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on partner engagement and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:12:00] Karen Berg (Iron Creek Mining): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is cost optimization.

[00:15:00] Karen Berg (Iron Creek Mining): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around budget approval.

[00:17:00] David (Iron Creek Mining): The timeline for performance requirements is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:20:00] Karen Berg (Iron Creek Mining): Let me add some context -- we've been working on partner engagement and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:24:00] David (Iron Creek Mining): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is timeline constraints.

[00:27:00] David (Iron Creek Mining): Let me add some context -- we've been working on security compliance and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:29:00] David (Iron Creek Mining): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is cost optimization.

[00:32:00] Karen Berg (Iron Creek Mining): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around security compliance.
